positive.prompt: Do a usability audit of my checkout flow
Run a heuristic evaluation of this screen
Review my app's UX for usability problems before user testing

negative.prompt: Improve my Core Web Vitals and fix layout shift
Make my site WCAG compliant and usable with a screen reader

evals.prompt: Clone and run https://github.com/carlsz/sprout, then run a live usability audit of its add / edit / complete / delete task flows.
evals.expected_output: A contract-valid usability report under Sprout/.ux/audits/ with severity-scored, Nielsen-cited findings; live-observed runtime findings marked verified.
expectations: Writes a report to Sprout/.ux/audits/usability-<timestamp>.md that validates against the shared report contract
Every finding cites a specific framework rule (e.g. Nielsen #1, #3, #6, #9) and carries a 0-4 severity, evidence, and a fix
Runtime-perception findings are stated as verified in live mode, not 'potential — unverified'
The appendix names in-scope areas that were not inspected (honest coverage)
Does not edit any of Sprout's application code
All writes are confined to Sprout/.ux/audits/
